top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.GasStationID) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
JOIN products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
WHERE g.Country = 'CZE' AND p.Description = 'Premium';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.GasStationID) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
JOIN products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
WHERE g.Country = 'CZE' AND p.Description = 'Premium';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.GasStationID) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
JOIN products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
WHERE g.Country = 'CZE' AND p.Description = 'Premium';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT g.GasStationID)
FROM gasstations g
WHERE g.Country = 'CZE'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
    WHERE t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
      AND p.Description = 'Premium'
  );

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.GasStationID) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
JOIN products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
WHERE g.Country = 'CZE' AND p.Description = 'Premium';
